title: symphyotrichum subspicatum
intro: Symphyotrichum subspicatum, also known as mountain aster, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial plant with small white or pink flowers that grow in clusters and have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Symphyotrichum subspicatum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system.
